fiveStar.name: Sarnga
fiveStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 30.0%/30.0%/39.0%/39.0%/48.0%/48.0%/57.0%.
When an ally attacks a foe inflicted with Erosion and has their HP recovered, increase HP Recovery by 15.7%/20.3%/20.3%/24.9%/24.9%/29.5%/29.5% + 600/800/800/1000/1000/1200/1200.
When Arrow of Life is used, for every Whisperwind stack spent, increase all allies' damage by 18.0%/23.5%/23.5%/29.0%/29.0%/34.5%/34.5% for 2 turns. Stacks up to 2 times.
